text: Standing here, I am transfixed by the interplay of glass, color, and text. The world is playful with ideas and possibilities. The tilted perspective humbles me—reminding me that knowledge is always seen from an angle. Spaces like these, dedicated to research and innovation, breathe with promise. I feel curious, slightly disoriented—ready to question how I perceive and engage with technology and knowledge. My awareness is heightened, my outlook reflective.
